events.description: User is examining the list of studies on the dashboard.
User clicks the 'Create new...' button in the sidebar.
A 'New study' dropdown menu appears with various study types.
User selects 'Interview study' from the dropdown menu.
Page navigates to the study setup flow.
User clears the default study title and types 'TV Streaming - Discovery'.
User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the research method step.
Navigation to the 'Research method' step.
User clicks 'Next' on the research method selection screen.
Navigation to the 'Device' requirements step.
User selects the 'Any device' option for device requirements.
User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to the tool selection step.
Navigation to the 'Tool' selection step.
User clicks the link 'I want to use a third party tool'.
events.interaction_target: I want to use a third party tool

events.description: User navigates from the 'Tool' setup step to the 'Quota' step
User changes the number of participants from 12 to 5 in the quota input field
events.interaction_target: How many participants do you need?
events.frame_description: User interacts with the numeric input field on the Quota page

events.description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the Quota page
User navigates to the 'Session format' step
User clicks the 'Next' button on the Session format page
User navigates to the 'Session duration' step
User clicks the 'Next' button on the Session duration page
User navigates to the 'Participant selection' step
User clicks the 'Next' button on the Participant selection page
User navigates to the 'Audience' -> 'Panel' step
User clicks the 'Next' button on the Audience Panel page
User navigates to the 'Participant location' step
User types 'United st' into the location search field
User selects 'United States' from the location dropdown results
User clicks the 'Next' button on the Participant location page
User navigates to the 'Demographic filters' step
User changes the exclusion filter to 'Don't exclude anyone'
events.interaction_target: Exclude people you've already spoken to

events.description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the Demographic filters page
User navigates to the 'Custom screener' step
User clicks 'Add a custom screening question'
A 'Multiple Choice' screener question modal appears on screen
events.frame_description: Modal overlay for creating a multiple choice screener question

events.description: User examines the 'Multiple Choice' screener question modal before beginning to enter content
User types the screener question: 'Which best describes you habits for how you interact with TV streaming services?'
User fills out four multiple choice answer options: 'I don't use them at all', 'I use them a few times per week', 'I use them daily', and 'I use them multiple times per day'
User clicks the 'Save' button to confirm the screener question and close the modal
The application navigates to the 'Additional Info' section after the screener question is saved
events.frame_description: The modal is closed, and the sidebar indicates the user is now in the 'Additional Info' section

events.description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the 'Create a custom screener' page.
The application navigates to the 'Your timezone' section under 'Additional Info'.
The user navigates back to the 'Custom screener' section.
User clicks the '+ Add another custom question' link to expand question options.
A dropdown menu appears with options: 'Multiple choice', 'Short answer', and 'Copy from other study'.
events.frame_description: Dropdown menu visible below the custom question list.

events.description: User hovers over different question type options in the dropdown menu, including 'Multiple choice', 'Short answer', and 'Copy from other study'.
User clicks on the 'Copy from other study' option in the dropdown menu.
A modal titled 'Select a study to copy from' appears with a loading spinner.
User hovers over various studies in the list within the 'Select a study to copy from' modal.
User clicks the 'X' button to close the 'Select a study to copy from' modal.
User clicks the '+ Add another custom question' button to reopen the question type menu.
User hovers over 'Multiple choice' and 'Short answer' options in the dropdown menu.
User clicks on the 'Short answer' option in the dropdown menu.
The 'Short answer' question creation modal appears on screen.
events.frame_description: Short answer modal with text input fields.

events.description: User begins typing a question, entering 'Wha' into the 'Screener question' field.
User types 'What is the name of your favourite TV show that you're watching right now?' into the screener question field.
events.frame_description: A modal titled 'Short answer' is open over the custom screener setup page.

events.description: User clicks the 'Save' button to confirm the short answer screener question
events.frame_description: The user is closing the 'Short answer' modal by clicking Save.

events.description: User clicks '+ Add another custom question' to open the question type selection menu
events.frame_description: A dropdown menu appears with question type options.

events.description: User selects 'Multiple choice' from the dropdown menu
events.frame_description: The user chooses the Multiple Choice question type.

events.description: User types 'Which' into the screener question input field in the Multiple Choice modal
events.frame_description: The user is beginning to draft a new multiple choice question.

events.description: User types the screener question: 'Which tv streaming service are you using most right now?'
events.frame_description: A 'Multiple Choice' modal is open over the custom screener setup page.

events.description: User types multiple answer options: 'Netflix', 'Stan', and 'Disney+'
User pauses and moves cursor over the answer options, appearing to review the entries before adding more
User types the final answer option: 'Prime Video'
User clicks the 'Save' button to finalize the custom question
The 'Multiple Choice' modal closes and the new question is visible in the screener list
User clicks on 'Additional Info' in the left sidebar menu
Page navigates to the 'Your timezone' section
User clicks the 'Next' button on the timezone page
Page navigates to the 'Description' section
events.page_title: Short description of who you're looking for

events.description: User types 'Do you watch TV on streaming services?' into the short description field
events.page_title: Short description of who you're looking for

events.description: User clicks the 'Next' button on the description page
Page navigates to 'Additional instructions' and user immediately clicks 'Next'
Page navigates to 'Contacts' and user immediately clicks 'Next'
Page navigates to 'Legal & Privacy' and user immediately clicks 'Next'
Page navigates to the 'Session Times' calendar view
User selects multiple time slots on the calendar for February 26th and 27th
User clicks the 'Next' button to proceed to review
Page navigates to 'Review & Submit'
User clicks the 'Submit study' button to finalize the booking setup.
events.frame_description: The cursor is positioned over the black 'Submit study' button on the review page.

events.description: The application navigates from the review screen to the participants dashboard.
User examines the participants dashboard, which displays a notification that the study is currently in review.
The screen briefly turns white, indicating a page refresh or a temporary loading state during the session.
events.frame_description: A blank white screen is visible between page states.

events.description: User clicks on the 'Settings' tab in the study dashboard navigation.
events.frame_description: The cursor is over the 'Settings' option in the top right navigation menu.

events.description: The application navigates to the study settings page.
